overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from God of War Ragnarök featuring Kratos exploring ancient Nordic ruins. The clip transitions from walking through a moss-covered stone archway into a sunlit courtyard to boating through the lush, overgrown Cliffside Ruins with towering trees and ancient structures lining the riverbanks.

events.description: approaching and entering ancient stone archway with glowing runic symbols
crouching slightly to pass through the low stone archway
emerging from shadowed archway into bright sunlit courtyard

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking through a narrow stone archway adorned with glowing blue runes, carrying his axe and shield while entering a sunlit courtyard

entered.detail: Ancient stone archway with glowing blue runic symbols carved into the surface
Tall weathered stone walls covered in green moss and climbing vegetation
Tall weathered stone walls covered in green moss and climbing vegetation
Open courtyard area with scattered stone ruins and a large central tree

segments.scene_description: Kratos approaches and walks through an ancient stone archway with glowing runes, emerging into a sunlit courtyard surrounded by moss-covered ruins. The camera follows closely from behind as he transitions from the enclosed archway into the open space, with dramatic sunlight streaming through the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown river canyon with cliffside ruins

events.description: screen fades in from black to reveal boating scene in Cliffside Ruins
location text 'Cliffside Ruins' appears on screen identifying the area
passing underneath a rustic wooden bridge structure spanning the river

agents.ego_description: Kratos paddling a wooden canoe through a narrow river canyon, navigating between ancient ruins and lush vegetation with Atreus in the boat

entered.detail: Small wooden boat carrying Kratos and Atreus through the river
Calm greenish water covered with algae and lily pads
Ancient stone structures and walls built into the cliffside covered in vines
Massive trees with thick trunks and sprawling branches forming a canopy
Rustic wooden bridge structure spanning overhead across the river

segments.scene_description: Following a brief transition, the scene opens on Kratos paddling a canoe through the Cliffside Ruins. The river winds through a narrow canyon with ancient stone walls and massive trees overhead. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the boat glides under wooden bridges and past overgrown ruins, with dappled sunlight filtering through the dense canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the enclosed stone ruins of an ancient gateway into a lush, river-bound canyon. It begins with Kratos walking through a rune-carved stone archway, moving from the shadows into a sunlit courtyard surrounded by moss-covered ruins. As the camera follows closely behind him, the open space of the courtyard shifts into a waterway where Kratos is now paddling a canoe through the Cliffside Ruins. The scene then expands as the boat glides through a narrow canyon, passing under wooden bridges and alongside overgrown stone walls. Finally, the camera maintains its smooth pursuit as the vessel winds deeper into the landscape, with dappled sunlight filtering through a dense canopy of massive overhead trees.
